# XC Miner — Desktop Bitcoin Miners

XC Miner builds high-performance desktop silent ASIC miners for Bitcoin and Scrypt mining. All products feature open-source firmware (ESP32-based, AxeOS compatible), silent cooling, and plug-and-play setup. The flagship Nexus Miner series is powered by next-gen BM1373 and BM1491 ASIC chips.

## Products

### Nexus Miner S1 — $780
- Chip: 4×BM1373
- Hashrate: 10.3 TH/s
- Power: 103W ±10%
- Efficiency: 10 J/TH
- Algorithm: SHA-256 (BTC/BCH/BSV)
- Noise: <50dB
- Link: https://xcminer.github.io/xcweb/product.html?id=nexuss1

### Nexus Miner L1 — $499
- Chip: 4×BM1491
- Hashrate: 320 MH/s
- Power: 70W ±10%
- Efficiency: 4.57 J/MH
- Algorithm: Scrypt (LTC/DOGE/BELLS)
- Noise: <50dB
- Link: https://xcminer.github.io/xcweb/product.html?id=nexusl1

### NerdQaxe++ (4.8 TH/s) — $310
- Chip: 4×BM1370
- Hashrate: 4.8 TH/s
- Power: 68W ±10%
- Efficiency: 15 J/TH
- Noise: <30dB
- Link: https://xcminer.github.io/xcweb/product.html?id=nerdqaxe48

### NerdQaxe++ Rev 6.1 (6.0 TH/s) — $340
- Chip: 4×BM1370
- Hashrate: 6.0 TH/s
- Power: 123W ±10%
- Efficiency: 20.57 J/TH
- Link: https://xcminer.github.io/xcweb/product.html?id=nerdqaxe6

### NerdQX — $500
- Chip: 4×BM1370
- Hashrate: 8.1 TH/s
- Power: 138W ±10%
- Efficiency: 17 J/TH
- Link: https://xcminer.github.io/xcweb/product.html?id=nerdqx

## Key Features
- Open Source Firmware: ESP32-based, AxeOS compatible, full control over pools, frequency, and voltage
- Whisper-Quiet: All models feature silent fans with intelligent thermal curves — as low as <30dB
- Plug & Play: USB-C or DC powered, connects via Wi-Fi, no technical background needed
- Real ASIC Chips: Latest Bitmain BM1373, BM1370, and BM1491 chips for maximum efficiency
- Solo Mining Ready: Perfect for home solo mining Bitcoin (SHA-256) and Litecoin/Dogecoin (Scrypt)
